login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to Bio-Data OS
login.welcomeSub: Sign in to continue to your research data.
login.brandHeadline: The data asset platform for drug R&D
login.brandSubtitle: Projects · data assets · data templates · datasets — iterable, traceable, maintainable. Sensitive structures hidden by default and granted on demand; 21 CFR Part 11 e-signatures and layered audit built in.
login.brandFootnote: Companies are invisible to users — sign in with just email + password.
login.platformConsole: Enter the platform console as super-admin →
login.tenantNeeded: We couldn't identify your company. Sign in via your company URL or contact your admin.
